stdout:
Table	Create Table
wa_contacts	CREATE TABLE `wa_contacts` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `sessionId` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `jid` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `lid` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `phoneNumber` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `pushName` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `savedName` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `verifiedName` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `profilePictureUrl` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */,
  KEY `wac_session_jid_idx` (`sessionId`,`jid`),
  KEY `wac_session_lid_idx` (`sessionId`,`lid`),
  KEY `wac_session_phone_idx` (`sessionId`,`phoneNumber`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci AUTO_INCREMENT=180001
